data.original_question: return me the number of papers which contain the keyword " Natural Language " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers which contain the keyword " Natural Language " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pk.pid) FROM publication_keyword pk JOIN keyword k ON pk.kid = k.kid WHERE k.keyword = ' Natural Language '

data.original_question: return me the number of the keywords of " Making database systems usable " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of the keywords of " Making database systems usable " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM publication_keyword WHERE pid = (SELECT pid FROM publication WHERE title = 'Making database systems usable')

data.original_question: return me the number of the keywords related to " H. V. Jagadish " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of the keywords related to " H. V. Jagadish " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pk.kid) FROM author a JOIN writes w ON a.aid = w.aid JOIN publication_keyword pk ON w.pid = pk.pid WHERE a.name = 'H. V. Jagadish'

data.original_question: return me the number of keywords in VLDB conference .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of keywords in VLDB conference .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT publication_keyword.kid) FROM conference JOIN publication ON conference.cid = publication.cid JOIN publication_keyword ON publication.pid = publication_keyword.pid WHERE conference.name = 'VLDB'

data.original_question: return me the number of keywords in PVLDB .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of keywords in PVLDB .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) FROM conference c JOIN publication p ON c.cid = p.cid JOIN publication_keyword pk ON p.pid = pk.pid JOIN keyword k ON pk.kid = k.kid WHERE c.name = 'PVLDB';

data.original_question: return me the number of keywords in the papers of " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: What is the count of unique keywords in the papers that are affiliated with "University of Michigan"?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Paper.Keyword) FROM Paper INNER JOIN PaperAuthor ON Paper.Id = PaperAuthor.PaperId WHERE PaperAuthor.Affiliation LIKE '%University of Michigan%' AND Paper.Keyword IS NOT NULL;

data.original_question: return me the number of the papers of " H. V. Jagadish " containing keyword " User Study " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of the papers of " H. V. Jagadish " containing keyword " User Study " .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT writes.pid)
FROM author
INNER JOIN writes ON author.aid = writes.aid
INNER JOIN publication_keyword ON writes.pid = publication_keyword.pid
INNER JOIN keyword ON publication_keyword.kid = keyword.kid
WHERE author.name = ' H. V. Jagadish ' 
AND keyword.keyword = ' User Study '

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in PVLDB containing keyword " Keyword search " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers in PVLDB containing keyword " Keyword search " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM publication JOIN journal ON publication.jid = journal.jid JOIN publication_keyword ON publication.pid = publication_keyword.pid JOIN keyword ON publication_keyword.kid = keyword.kid WHERE journal.name = 'PVLDB' AND keyword.keyword = 'Keyword search'

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in VLDB conference containing keyword " Information Retrieval " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers in VLDB conference containing keyword " Information Retrieval " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT publication.pid) FROM publication JOIN conference ON publication.cid = conference.cid JOIN publication_keyword ON publication.pid = publication_keyword.pid JOIN keyword ON publication_keyword.kid = keyword.kid WHERE conference.name = 'VLDB' AND keyword.keyword = ' Information Retrieval '

data.original_question: return me the number of authors who have papers containing keyword " Relational Database " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of authors who have papers containing keyword " Relational Database " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.aid) FROM writes w JOIN publication_keyword pk ON w.pid = pk.pid JOIN keyword k ON pk.kid = k.kid WHERE k.keyword = ' Relational Database '

data.original_question: return me the total citations of the papers containing keyword " Natural Language "
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of the papers containing keyword " Natural Language "
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(publication.citation_num) FROM publication INNER JOIN publication_keyword ON publication.pid = publication_keyword.pid INNER JOIN keyword ON publication_keyword.kid = keyword.kid WHERE keyword.keyword = ' Natural Language '

data.original_question: return me the number of the organizations .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of the organizations .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Organizations;

data.original_question: return me the number of the organizations in " North America " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of the organizations in " North America " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM country WHERE Continent = 'North America';

data.original_question: return me the number of organizations in Databases area .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of organizations in Databases area .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Organizations WHERE organization_name = 'Databases';

data.original_question: return me the number of organizations in Databases area located in " North America " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of organizations in Databases area located in " North America " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM country WHERE Region = 'Databases' AND Continent = 'North America';

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers in " University of Michigan " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Papers.paperID) FROM Authorship JOIN Inst ON Authorship.instID = Inst.instID JOIN Papers ON Authorship.paperID = Papers.paperID WHERE Inst.name = 'University of Michigan'

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in " University of Michigan " in Databases area .
data.resolved_question: What is the count of papers in the "University of Michigan" affiliation in the "Databases" area across all databases?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.paperId) FROM paper p JOIN venue v ON p.venueId = v.venueId JOIN paperKeyphrase pk ON p.paperId = pk.paperId JOIN keyphrase k ON pk.keyphraseId = k.keyphraseId WHERE v.venueName = 'University of Michigan' AND k.keyphraseName = 'Databases'

data.original_question: return me the number of papers after 2000 in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers after 2000 in " University of Michigan " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper INNER JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'University of Michigan' AND paper.year > 2000;

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in VLDB conference in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: What is the count of papers published in the VLDB conference at the University of Michigan?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper INNER JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'VLDB' AND paper.venueId IN (SELECT venueId FROM venue WHERE venueName LIKE '%University of Michigan%');

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in PVLDB in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: What is the count of papers published in the journal "PVLDB" that are affiliated with the "University of Michigan"?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper INNER JOIN journal ON paper.journalId = journal.journalId WHERE journal.journalName = 'PVLDB' AND paper.paperId IN (SELECT paperId FROM writes WHERE authorId IN (SELECT authorId FROM author WHERE authorName LIKE '%University of Michigan%'));

data.original_question: return me the number of papers in PVLDB after 2000 in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers in PVLDB after 2000 in " University of Michigan " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT publication.pid) FROM publication JOIN journal ON publication.jid = journal.jid JOIN writes ON publication.pid = writes.pid JOIN author ON writes.aid = author.aid JOIN organization ON author.oid = organization.oid WHERE journal.name = 'PVLDB' AND publication.year > 2000 AND organization.name = 'University of Michigan'

data.original_question: return me the total citations of the papers in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of the papers in " University of Michigan " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(p.numCiting) FROM paper p JOIN writes w ON p.paperId = w.paperId JOIN author a ON w.authorId = a.authorId WHERE a.authorName LIKE '%University of Michigan%';

data.original_question: return me the number of researchers in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: What is the total number of researchers (i.e., faculty members) at the University of Michigan?
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(f.Faculty) FROM faculty f JOIN Campuses c ON f.Campus = c.Id WHERE c.Campus = 'University of Michigan';

data.original_question: return me the number of researchers in Databases area in " University of Michigan " .
data.resolved_question: What is the total number of researchers in the "Databases" area at the "University of Michigan"?
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(Graduate) AS Researchers FROM discipline_enrollments JOIN Campuses ON discipline_enrollments.Campus = Campuses.Id WHERE Campuses.Campus = 'University of Michigan' AND Discipline = 'Databases';

data.original_question: return me the number of authors who have papers in PVLDB .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of authors who have papers in PVLDB .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT writes.authorId) FROM paper JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId JOIN writes ON paper.paperId = writes.paperId WHERE venue.venueName = 'PVLDB'

data.original_question: return me the number of authors who have papers in the VLDB conference .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of authors who have papers in the VLDB conference .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PaperAuthor.AuthorId) FROM Conference JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId JOIN PaperAuthor ON Paper.Id = PaperAuthor.PaperId WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'VLDB'

data.original_question: return me the number of papers published on PVLDB before 2000 .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers published on PVLDB before 2000 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'PVLDB' AND paper.year < 2000;

data.original_question: return me the number of papers published in the VLDB conference before 2000 .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers published in the VLDB conference before 2000 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'VLDB' AND paper.year < 2000;

data.original_question: return me the total citations of all the papers in PVLDB .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of all the papers in PVLDB .
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(p.numCitedBy) FROM paper p JOIN venue v ON p.venueId = v.venueId WHERE v.venueName = 'PVLDB'

data.original_question: return me the citations of each paper in PVLDB .
data.resolved_question: return me the citations of each paper in PVLDB .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT p.paperId, p.title, p.numCiting, p.numCitedBy 
FROM paper p 
JOIN venue v ON p.venueId = v.venueId 
WHERE v.venueName = 'PVLDB'

data.original_question: return me the total citations of papers in PVLDB in 2005 .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of papers in PVLDB in 2005 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cite WHERE citedPaperId IN (SELECT paper.paperId FROM paper JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'PVLDB' AND paper.year = 2005)

data.original_question: return me the total citations of papers in PVLDB before 2005 .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of papers in PVLDB before 2005 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cite WHERE citedPaperId IN (SELECT paper.paperId FROM paper JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'PVLDB' AND paper.year < 2005)

data.original_question: return me the total citations of papers in PVLDB in each year .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of papers in PVLDB in each year .
data.generated_sql: SELECT p.year, COUNT(*) AS total_citations FROM paper p JOIN venue v ON p.venueId = v.venueId JOIN cite c ON p.paperId = c.citedPaperId WHERE v.venueName = 'PVLDB' GROUP BY p.year ORDER BY p.year;

data.original_question: return me the number of papers published in PVLDB in each year .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers published in PVLDB in each year .
data.generated_sql: SELECT paper.year, COUNT(*) FROM paper JOIN venue ON paper.venueId = venue.venueId WHERE venue.venueName = 'PVLDB' GROUP BY paper.year;

data.original_question: return me the total citations of all the papers in the VLDB conference .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of all the papers in the VLDB conference .
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(p.citation_num) FROM publication p JOIN conference c ON p.cid = c.cid WHERE c.name = 'VLDB'

data.original_question: return me the citations of each paper in the VLDB conference .
data.resolved_question: return me the citations of each paper in the VLDB conference .
data.generated_sql: SELECT p.pid, COUNT(c.cited) AS citation_count FROM publication p JOIN conference conf ON p.cid = conf.cid LEFT JOIN cite c ON p.pid = c.cited WHERE conf.name = 'VLDB' GROUP BY p.pid;

data.original_question: return me the total citations of papers in the VLDB conference in 2005 .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of papers in the VLDB conference in 2005 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(publication.citation_num) FROM publication JOIN conference ON publication.cid = conference.cid WHERE conference.name = 'VLDB' AND publication.year = 2005;

data.original_question: return me the total citations of papers in the VLDB conference before 2005 .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of papers in the VLDB conference before 2005 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(p.citation_num) FROM publication p INNER JOIN conference c ON p.cid = c.cid WHERE c.name = 'VLDB' AND p.year < 2005;

data.original_question: return me the total citations of papers in the VLDB conference in each year .
data.resolved_question: return me the total citations of papers in the VLDB conference in each year .
data.generated_sql: SELECT p.year, SUM(p.citation_num) FROM publication p JOIN conference c ON p.cid = c.cid WHERE c.name = 'VLDB' GROUP BY p.year;

data.original_question: return me the number of papers published in the VLDB conference in each year .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers published in the VLDB conference in each year .
data.generated_sql: SELECT Paper.Year, COUNT(*) FROM Paper INNER JOIN Conference ON Paper.ConferenceId = Conference.Id WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'VLDB' GROUP BY Paper.Year;

data.original_question: return me the authors who have cooperated both with " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " .
data.resolved_question: return me the authors who have cooperated both with " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT a.authID, a.fname || ' ' || a.lname AS name
FROM Authors a
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Authorship AS1
    WHERE AS1.authID = a.authID
    AND AS1.paperID IN (
        SELECT paperID
        FROM Authorship
        WHERE authID = (
            SELECT authID
            FROM Authors
            WHERE fname || ' ' || lname = 'H. V. Jagadish'
        )
    )
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Authorship AS2
    WHERE AS2.authID = a.authID
    AND AS2.paperID IN (
        SELECT paperID
        FROM Authorship
        WHERE authID = (
            SELECT authID
            FROM Authors
            WHERE fname || ' ' || lname = 'Divesh Srivastava'
        )
    )
)

data.original_question: return me the authors who have cooperated with " H. V. Jagadish " after 2000 .
data.resolved_question: return me the authors who have cooperated with " H. V. Jagadish " after 2000 .
data.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.name FROM author a INNER JOIN writes w ON a.aid = w.aid INNER JOIN publication p ON w.pid = p.pid WHERE p.year > 2000 AND w.pid IN (SELECT w2.pid FROM writes w2 INNER JOIN author a2 ON w2.aid = a2.aid WHERE a2.name = 'H. V. Jagadish') AND a.name != 'H. V. Jagadish'

data.original_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " .
data.resolved_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT p.* 
FROM publication p
JOIN writes w ON p.pid = w.pid
JOIN author a ON w.aid = a.aid
WHERE a.name IN ('H. V. Jagadish', 'Divesh Srivastava')
GROUP BY p.pid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.aid) = 2;

data.original_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Yunyao Li " after 2005 .
data.resolved_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Yunyao Li " after 2005 .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT p.paperId, p.title
FROM paper p
JOIN writes w ON p.paperId = w.paperId
JOIN author a ON w.authorId = a.authorId
WHERE a.authorName IN ('H. V. Jagadish', 'Yunyao Li') AND p.year > 2005
GROUP BY p.paperId
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.authorId) = 2;

data.original_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Yunyao Li " on PVLDB .
data.resolved_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Yunyao Li " on PVLDB .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT Paper.Id, Paper.Title
FROM Paper
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id
WHERE Journal.ShortName = 'PVLDB'
AND Paper.Id IN (
    SELECT PaperAuthor.PaperId
    FROM PaperAuthor
    WHERE PaperAuthor.AuthorId IN (
        SELECT Author.Id
        FROM Author
        WHERE Author.Name IN ('H. V. Jagadish', 'Yunyao Li')
    )
    GROUP BY PaperAuthor.PaperId
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT PaperAuthor.AuthorId) = 2
);

data.original_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Yunyao Li " on PVLDB after 2005 .
data.resolved_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Yunyao Li " on PVLDB after 2005 .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT p.paperId, p.title
FROM paper p
JOIN venue v ON p.venueId = v.venueId
JOIN writes w1 ON p.paperId = w1.paperId
JOIN author a1 ON w1.authorId = a1.authorId
JOIN writes w2 ON p.paperId = w2.paperId
JOIN author a2 ON w2.authorId = a2.authorId
WHERE a1.authorName = 'H. V. Jagadish'
  AND a2.authorName = 'Yunyao Li'
  AND v.venueName = 'PVLDB'
  AND p.year > 2005;

data.original_question: return me the authors who have cooperated with " H. V. Jagadish " .
data.resolved_question: return me the authors who have cooperated with " H. V. Jagadish " .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.authID, a.fname, a.lname
FROM Authors a
JOIN Authorship coauth ON a.authID = coauth.authID
WHERE coauth.paperID IN (
    SELECT paperID
    FROM Authorship
    WHERE authID = (
        SELECT authID
        FROM Authors
        WHERE fname || ' ' || lname = 'H. V. Jagadish'
    )
)
AND a.authID != (
    SELECT authID
    FROM Authors
    WHERE fname || ' ' || lname = 'H. V. Jagadish'
)

data.original_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " before 2000 .
data.resolved_question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " before 2000 .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT p.paperId, p.title, p.year
FROM paper p
WHERE p.year < 2000
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM writes w1
    JOIN author a1 ON w1.authorId = a1.authorId
    WHERE w1.paperId = p.paperId AND a1.authorName = 'H. V. Jagadish'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM writes w2
    JOIN author a2 ON w2.authorId = a2.authorId
    WHERE w2.paperId = p.paperId AND a2.authorName = 'Divesh Srivastava'
);

data.original_question: return me the authors who have cited the papers by " H. V. Jagadish " .
data.resolved_question: return me the authors who have cited the papers by " H. V. Jagadish " .
data.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.name
FROM author a
JOIN writes w ON a.aid = w.aid
JOIN cite c ON w.pid = c.citing
WHERE c.cited IN (
    SELECT w2.pid
    FROM author auth
    JOIN writes w2 ON auth.aid = w2.aid
    WHERE auth.name = ' H. V. Jagadish ' 
)

data.original_question: return me the number of papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " .
data.resolved_question: return me the number of papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " .
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PaperAuthor.PaperId) FROM PaperAuthor INNER JOIN Author ON PaperAuthor.AuthorId = Author.Id WHERE Author.Name IN ('H. V. Jagadish','Divesh Srivastava')
